{{CargoRelic
|name=Triumph of Bacchus
|class_id=21294
|rank=AAA
|affct=FAITH
|source=
|description=This is a mosaic artwork from ancient Rome, depicting a procession scene of the god Bacchus and his followers. The image of Bacchus has had a profound influence in literature, drama, music, and other fields, as part of ancient Roman culture, and has been referenced in many later cultural and artistic works, such as Nicolas Poussin's painting of the same name, a typical work influenced by ancient Roman culture, and a classic in Western art history.
|fame=45
|art=48
|fth=73
|civ=32
|tech=45
|ss1=Snail ATK +10<br>Snail DEF +10
|ss2=Snail ATK +20<br>Snail DEF +20
|ss3=Snail ATK +30<br>Snail DEF +30
|ss4=Snail ATK +50<br>Snail DEF +50
|ss5=Snail ATK +70<br>Snail DEF +70
|ss7=Snail ATK +70<br>Snail DEF +70<br>Snail HP +1000 (Awakened)
|skill1=[[File:Skill skill II.png|50px]]??? (Coming soon)
|skill2=[[File:Skill skill II.png|50px]]??? (Coming soon)
}}
